name - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.CollegeBean
Name of the college

Stores course name.
name - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.MarksheetBean
Stores student name

Stores role name
name - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.SubjectBean
Stores subject name
nextPk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.CollegeModel
Extracts and generates the next available operational Primary Key index value inside the target storage structure for concurrency management.
nextPk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.CourseModel
Extracts and generates the next available operational Primary Key index value inside the target storage structure for concurrency management.
nextPk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.FacultyModel
Extracts and generates the next available operational Primary Key index value inside the target storage structure for concurrency management.
nextPk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.MarksheetModel
Extracts and generates the next available operational Primary Key index value inside the target storage structure for concurrency management.
nextPk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.RoleModel
Generates the next automated Primary Key for the 'st_role' table.
nextPk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.StudentModel
Generates the next automated Primary Key for the 'st_student' table.
nextPk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.SubjectModel
Generates the next automated Primary Key for the 'st_subject' table.
nextPk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Generates the next Automated Primary Key for the table.
nextPk() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.UserModel
Generates next primary key for ST_USER table.
